items.headline: Fox Stock Extends Slide to Second Day After Roku Deal
items.summary: Fox  stock continued to fall a second day after the broadcaster announced an agreement to buy streaming technology maker  Roku  on Monday.  Fox Class A shares were down 5.6% at $51.69, and Fox Class B shares were down 5.1% at $47.42 just after 11 a.m. Eastern time.  Roku shares were down 1.5% at $138.80.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Roku For Sale? JPMorgan Sees Comcast As The Most Logical Buyer
items.summary: Roku Inc. (NASDAQ:ROKU) shares surged Friday after a report suggested the streaming platform is exploring a potential sale. Now, JPMorgan believes one name stands out from a crowded field of possible buyers. In a note following the report, analyst Cory Carpenter said Roku’s combination of TV operating system ownership and distribution into more than 100 million households makes it a strategic asset.
